name: clanka
description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins by gallanoe.

plugins.name: clanka
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code: an orchestrator agent that classifies user intent and delegates to specialist subagents.

plugins.name: antirot
plugins.description: Turns a high-level curriculum outline into a fully-written, fast-paced, Obsidian-native Markdown course via a manifest-coordinated design → generate → check pipeline.
